operations.rationale: Remove the retired Antigravity desktop enablement table before reusing agents.antigravity for the agy-backed client. Source-agnostic so the 0.10.1 → 0.10.2 upgrade also works when no pin / baseline / snapshot can resolve the source version. Re-run safety is provided by the al upgrade pin-bump on successful runs (subsequent runs see source=0.10.2 and skip this manifest entirely).
Migrate the deprecated Gemini CLI enablement flag to the replacement agy-backed Antigravity client.
Remove the leftover deprecated Gemini CLI table, including unsupported model and reasoning_effort keys.
Ensure required agents.antigravity.enabled exists when no Gemini CLI setting was present.
Replace the deprecated Gemini CLI client ID in MCP server client lists with Antigravity.
Remove the GEMINI.md instruction shim now that the Gemini CLI is retired; agy reads AGENTS.md.
